section.div: ESP32 based CO2 monitor using a SenseAir S8 sensor. Some additional features like graphs, touch screen, and MQTT support were added to have a fully functional device.
Application framework with state management and built-in dependency injection support

footer.span: Last updated 21 Jul 2026, 17:07:33 (timezone Europe/Berlin) with lowlighter/metrics@3.34.0
